title: sterculia tantraensis
intro: Sterculia tantraensis, also known as the Sterculia tree or the 'Himalayan Horse Radish', is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. The medicinal properties of Sterculia tantraensis include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparations of Sterculia tantraensis include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
